text:
20 Questions with Black Flag's Edward Kenway
We sat down with Matt Ryan, who plays Edward Kenway in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, to answer questions about the game, returning to the role 13 years later, and general pirate inquiries.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Six One Indie Showcase 2026
The Six One Indie Showcase aims to offer promotional opportunities to indie developers that may not have the means to highlight their games within the traditional showcase ecosystem of the industry. What began as a small DIY passion project has blossomed into a professionally produced premiere presentation for independent games.

Each Showcase features never-before-seen world premieres, digital showcase debuts, and exclusive news from indie developers and publishers from across the globe. Once the Showcase ends, audiences are able to delve deeper with developer interviews, hands-on previews, and the Six One Indie Showcase Steam Event featuring discounts and demos from participants.
